title: lasianthus politus
intro: Lasianthus politus, also known as the Taiwan bayberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lasianthus politus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The herbal preparations of Lasianthus politus include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules.
